narrative:
Northwest Twp township has 729 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points.
